headline: The Surprising Reason Airline Stocks Are Soaring
summary: Airline stocks have outperformed despite high fuel prices and geopolitical risks, and two of them can continue to prosper in 2026.

headline: iHeartMedia, Sabre, and United Airlines Stocks Trade Down, What You Need To Know
summary: A number of stocks fell in the afternoon session after oil prices approaching $98 per barrel renewed inflation concerns and reduced expectations for near-term interest rate relief.
